name: xau_m15_bb_bounce_3bar
hypothesis: On XAUUSD M15, a 3-bar Bollinger Band rejection pattern (poke-and-close-back-inside) signals short-term mean reversion with asymmetric R:R when ATR-normalized band width is moderate.

entry_rules.long: bar[-2].close > lower_bb(20,2.0) AND bar[-1].low <= lower_bb(20,2.0) AND bar[0].close > lower_bb(20,2.0) AND bar[0].close > bar[0].open AND bb_width/atr(14) between 0.8 and 3.0
entry_rules.short: bar[-2].close < upper_bb(20,2.0) AND bar[-1].high >= upper_bb(20,2.0) AND bar[0].close < upper_bb(20,2.0) AND bar[0].close < bar[0].open AND bb_width/atr(14) between 0.8 and 3.0

exit_rules.tp: 2.5 * ATR(14) from entry (targets middle/opposite band zone)
exit_rules.optional: early close on opposite BB touch

regime_filter.rule: adx(14) < 28 (avoid strong trend); atr_percentile(14,500) >= 25 (avoid dead vol)
